authors: Al-Kaisy A, Palmisani S, Smith TE, Pang D, Lam K, Burgoyne W, Houghton R, Hudson E, Lucas J
title: 10 kHz High-Frequency Spinal Cord Stimulation for Chronic Axial Low Back Pain in Patients With No History of Spinal Surgery: A Preliminary, Prospective, Open Label and Proof-of-Concept Study
journal_name: Neuromodulation: Technology at the Neural Interface
study_question: Does 10 kHz HF-SCS effectively treat chronic axial low back pain in patients without prior spinal surgery?
population_assessed: Patients with chronic axial low back pain, no prior spinal surgery, medically refractory, 18-65 years.
outcome_measures: Back pain VAS, ODI, quality-adjusted life year gain, opioid use
inclusion_criteria: Chronic axial low back pain, no prior spinal surgery, failed conservative management, 18-65 years.
answer_to_study_question: HF10 therapy significantly reduced back pain, disability, and opioid use, improving quality of life.
